--- property_exists.sql
PROPERTY_EXISTS(n, name)

--- AST
&ast.CallExpr{
  Rparen: 23,
  Func:   &ast.Path{
    Idents: []*ast.Ident{
      &ast.Ident{
        NameEnd: 15,
        Name:    "PROPERTY_EXISTS",
      },
    },
  },
  Args: []ast.Arg{
    &ast.ExprArg{
      Expr: &ast.Ident{
        NamePos: 16,
        NameEnd: 17,
        Name:    "n",
      },
    },
    &ast.ExprArg{
      Expr: &ast.Ident{
        NamePos: 19,
        NameEnd: 23,
        Name:    "name",
      },
    },
  },
}

--- SQL
PROPERTY_EXISTS(n, name)
